title: Input Enhancement in String Matching
description: A visual representation of the preprocessing stage in string matching algorithms, showing how input enhancement creates auxiliary data structures to improve pattern searching efficiency.
elements: Enhanced Data Structure (e.g., Shift Table, Prefix Table)
relationships: Preprocessing Function analyzes the Pattern to create an Enhanced Data Structure
Pattern Matching Algorithm uses the Enhanced Data Structure to perform an Efficient Search Operation on the Original Text
The Enhanced Data Structure provides rules for optimal character skipping or direct matching
